methods.method_name: Sediment Collection and Age Model Calculation
methods.description: Process for collecting sediment samples from DSDP Site 607 and calculating age models using the LR04 benthic foraminifera derived global δ18O stack.

steps.description: Sediments were taken from Deep Sea Drilling Project (DSDP) Site 607 in the mid-North Atlantic.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from DSDP Site 607

steps.description: The age models for both sites were calculated from Lisiecki and Raymo's LR04 benthic foraminifera derived global δ18O stack.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate age models using LR04 δ18O stack

methods.description: Calculation of linear sedimentation rates and mass accumulation rates (MARs) using age models and shipboard observations.

steps.description: Calcium carbonate (CaCO3) MARs were calculated from shipboard observations of CaCO3 content, density, and water content.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate CaCO3 MARs from shipboard observations

steps.description: Planktic foraminiferal mass accumulation rates (FMAR) were calculated from the bulk MARs and the sand content.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate FMAR from bulk MARs and sand content
